mano_cua.result_summary: 页面白屏，编辑器界面完全无法渲染。Console 检测到 22 个错误：核心问题是 Webpack Module parse failed - @simonwep/pickr/dist/pickr.min.js 第 2 行解析失败（缺少 loader 配置），导致 WDS 阻止编译和页面加载。另有 TS2688 Cannot find type definition file for minimatch、多个 TS2339 Property $cursor does not exist on type Selection（ProseMirror 不兼容）、TS2345 Buffer/Element 类型不匹配等错误。应用完全无法启动和使用。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Page is blank white screen. Console shows 22 errors. Root cause: Module parse failed for @simonwep/pickr/dist/pickr.min.js - webpack lacks appropriate loader. Also TS type errors in ProseMirror ($cursor property), emails (Buffer vs string), and missing minimatch type definitions. Application completely unusable.
